name: IdsDmMbrshDmFmlyLmtDel

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) DELETE T FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_SCHEMAOwner}.MBRSH_DM_FMLY_LMT AS T JOIN cte ON T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> cte.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO

Description:

PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and updates the datamart table MBRSH_DM_FMLY_LMT

Annotations:
Job Name: IdsDmDeleteJobDel
Read Load File created in the IdsDmMbrshDmFmlyLmtExtr Job
Copy Stage for buffer
Delet data from 

MBRSH_DM_FMLY_LMT  table where LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> RunCycle.
